name: mass_kg
label: total mass
description: Rolled-up vehicle mass including driver and mirrored corner masses.

name: cg_height_m
label: CG height
description: Mass-rollup CG height used for load transfer.

name: front_static_frac
label: front static load fraction
description: Static front axle weight fraction from longitudinal CG.

name: wheelbase_m
label: wheelbase
description: Front-to-rear wheel center spacing.

name: track_front_m
label: front track
description: Front lateral wheel-center spacing.

name: track_rear_m
label: rear track
description: Rear lateral wheel-center spacing.

name: lltd
label: lateral load transfer distribution
description: Front share of total lateral load transfer in EnvelopeSim.

name: air_density_kg_m3
label: air density
description: Atmospheric density multiplier on aero loads and drag.

name: cl_a_m2
label: downforce area
description: Total downforce coefficient times reference area.

name: cd_a_m2
label: drag area
description: Drag coefficient times reference area.

name: aero_balance_front
label: front aero balance
description: Front axle share of total downforce.

name: max_drive_power_w
label: max drive power
description: Power cap used by EnvelopeSim's drive force limit.

name: max_drive_force_n
label: max drive force
description: Low-speed drivetrain or traction force cap before tire limits.

name: drive_distribution_front
label: front drive distribution
description: Front share of drive force. Baseline 0 is RWD.

name: max_brake_force_n
label: max brake force
description: Brake system cap before tire limits.

name: brake_distribution_front
label: front brake distribution
description: Front share of brake force.

name: longitudinal_mu_scale
label: longitudinal tire peak scale
description: Scale factor applied to longitudinal peak tire friction.

name: longitudinal_load_sensitivity_scale
label: longitudinal tire load sensitivity scale
description: Scale factor applied to the longitudinal load-sensitivity term.

name: lateral_mu_scale
label: lateral tire peak scale
description: Scale factor applied to lateral peak tire friction.

name: lateral_load_sensitivity_scale
label: lateral tire load sensitivity scale
description: Scale factor applied to the lateral load-sensitivity term.
